items.title_en: French MPs approve assisted dying law with strict rules after years of argument
items.title_zh: 经过多年争论，法国国会议员批准了有严格规定的安乐死法

items.desc_zh: 该法案将允许符合严格标准的绝症成年人接受辅助死亡。

items.title_en: Anthropic moves closer to mega-IPO as bankers line up investor meetings

items.desc_en: Anthropic is lining up investor meetings ahead of a potential IPO as soon as October as the AI startup behind looks to beat rival OpenAI to the public markets.

items.title_en: Warren Buffett on the market today: 'It's tough to find values when everybody is preferring gambling'
items.title_zh: 沃伦·巴菲特今天在市场上表示：“当每个人都喜欢赌博时，很难找到价值”
items.desc_en: The investor has been sharply critical of the stock market, one that he says is increasingly defined by speculative trading as opposed to long-term investing.
items.desc_zh: 这位投资者一直对股市持尖锐批评态度，他表示股市越来越多地被投机交易而非长期投资所定义。

items.title_en: Venezuela government to launch formal talks with opposition members
items.title_zh: 委内瑞拉政府将与反对派成员展开正式会谈
items.desc_en: The opposition says the aim of the talks is to strengthen the democratic institutions and the electoral system.
items.desc_zh: 反对派表示，会谈的目的是加强民主制度和选举制度。

items.title_en: Italy's Meloni suffers surprise setback in close vote on electoral reform
items.title_zh: 意大利的梅洛尼在选举改革的激烈投票中遭遇意外挫折
items.desc_en: The defeat triggered opposition calls for Meloni to resign ahead of next year's general election.
items.desc_zh: 这次失败引发反对派呼吁梅洛尼在明年大选前辞职。

items.title_en: Heatwave prompts Italy's delivery riders to strike for extra rights
items.title_zh: 热浪促使意大利送货骑手罢工以争取额外权利
items.desc_en: Delivery riders in Milan, Bologna and Florence want to protect their health and their wages.
items.desc_zh: 米兰、博洛尼亚和佛罗伦萨的送货骑手希望保护自己的健康和工资。

items.title_en: Iran threatens to block more trade routes as US launches fresh strikes
items.title_zh: 随着美国发动新的打击，伊朗威胁要封锁更多贸易路线
items.desc_en: US President Donald Trump vowed to strike Iran's bridges and power plants next week if the country does not return to talks.
items.desc_zh: 美国总统唐纳德·特朗普发誓，如果伊朗不重返谈判，下周将袭击伊朗的桥梁和发电厂。

items.title_en: Mortgage rates rise to highest level in nearly a year, causing homebuyers to pause
items.title_zh: 抵押贷款利率升至近一年来最高水平，导致购房者望而却步
items.desc_en: Mortgage rates moved higher last week, causing buyers to pull back, but refinancing did see small gains.
items.desc_zh: 上周抵押贷款利率走高，导致买家撤退，但再融资确实出现了小幅上涨。

items.title_en: Sierra Leone drops treason charge against ex-president over attempted coup
items.title_zh: 塞拉利昂撤销对前总统未遂政变的叛国指控

items.desc_zh: 2023 年，枪手闯入军械库和一些监狱释放囚犯，欧内斯特·拜·科罗马 (Ernest Bai Koroma) 被捕。

items.desc_zh: 最近几天，俄罗斯和乌克兰对彼此的货物运输基础设施发动了攻击。

items.title_zh: 英国提议对 16 岁和 17 岁青少年实行午夜社交媒体宵禁

items.desc_zh: 政府表示这将改善青少年的生活，但活动人士称这是“错失的机会”。

items.title_en: Kenyan court dismisses Rastafarians' bid to legalise cannabis
items.title_zh: 肯尼亚法院驳回拉斯塔法里教徒大麻合法化的请求
items.desc_en: The court acknowledged the need for a broader national debate on cannabis policy in Kenya.
items.desc_zh: 法院承认需要就肯尼亚的大麻政策进行更广泛的全国辩论。

items.title_en: China economic growth falls sharply, missing target
items.title_zh: 中国经济增速大幅下滑，未达目标
items.desc_en: Weak demand domestically and the impact of the Iran war on oil prices overshadowed the country's strong exports.
items.desc_zh: 国内需求疲软以及伊朗战争对油价的影响掩盖了该国强劲的出口。

items.title_en: Seven Britons among those killed in Spain wildfires
items.title_zh: 西班牙山火造成七名英国人死亡
items.desc_en: Twelve of the 13 victims were foreign nationals, Spanish authorities said on Tuesday.
items.desc_zh: 西班牙当局周二表示，13 名受害者中有 12 人是外国人。

items.title_en: Trump retreat over Hormuz tolls suggests he is struggling to end Iran war
items.title_zh: 特朗普在霍尔木兹海峡伤亡问题上的退缩表明他正在努力结束伊朗战争
items.desc_en: The abrupt about-face from the US president was the latest twist in a conflict that has now lasted more than four months.
items.desc_zh: 美国总统的突然转变是这场已经持续四个多月的冲突的最新转折。

items.title_zh: 《Pokémon Go》问世 10 周年，数百万人仍在尝试捕捉它们
items.desc_en: Michael Steranka, vice president at the mobile game's owner Scopely, says it has always been about bringing people together.
items.desc_zh: 手机游戏所有者 Scopely 的副总裁迈克尔·斯特兰卡 (Michael Steranka) 表示，这款游戏一直致力于将人们聚集在一起。

items.title_en: Meta pulls new AI image feature after days of backlash
items.title_zh: 经过几天的强烈反对后，Meta 取消了新的人工智能图像功能
items.desc_en: Meta's release this week of an AI feature that let people alter Instagram content drew swift blowback.
items.desc_zh: Meta 本周发布了一项人工智能功能，可以让人们改变 Instagram 内容，但很快就引起了反弹。

items.title_en: Is the Assassin's Creed Black Flag remake worth the 13 year wait?
items.title_zh: 《刺客信条：黑旗》重制版值得 13 年的等待吗？
items.desc_en: The BBC's Tom Gerken plays the much-anticipated pirate game which has been remade from the ground up.
items.desc_zh: BBC 的汤姆·格肯 (Tom Gerken) 扮演了这款备受期待的海盗游戏，该游戏已从头开始重制。

items.title_en: Apple sues OpenAI, its employees claiming theft of trade secrets
items.title_zh: 苹果起诉 OpenAI，其员工声称窃取商业机密
items.desc_en: Apple said in a Friday lawsuit that OpenAI’s nascent hardware business is “rotten to its core.”
items.desc_zh: 苹果在周五的诉讼中表示，OpenAI 新兴的硬件业务“已经烂到了核心”。

items.title_en: EU threatens Meta with fines over 'addictive' Facebook and Instagram
items.title_zh: 欧盟因 Facebook 和 Instagram 上瘾而对 Meta 进行罚款威胁
items.desc_en: Regulators say features such as infinite scroll contribute to "compulsive use" and "unhealthy habits".
items.desc_zh: 监管机构表示，无限滚动等功能会导致“强迫性使用”和“不健康的习惯”。

items.title_en: Big tech must deal with scam ads under Ofcom proposals
items.title_zh: 根据 Ofcom 的提议，大型科技公司必须处理诈骗广告
items.desc_en: Ofcom says more than half of UK adults have encountered potentially fraudulent ads online.
items.desc_zh: Ofcom 表示，超过一半的英国成年人在网上遇到过潜在的欺诈性广告。

items.title_en: 'Cool in 90 seconds' - the fake portable air conditioners sweeping the internet
items.title_zh: “90秒制冷”——假冒移动空调席卷网络
items.desc_en: The ASA says adverts claiming small devices can rapidly cool rooms were too good to be true.
items.desc_zh: ASA 表示，声称小型设备可以快速冷却房间的广告好得令人难以置信。

items.title_en: Pressure builds on Europe's biggest port to be greener
items.title_zh: 欧洲最大港口面临更加环保的压力
items.desc_en: A lawsuit demands that the Port of Rotterdam moves faster to cut its dependence on fossil fuel firms.
items.desc_zh: 一项诉讼要求鹿特丹港加快行动，减少对化石燃料公司的依赖。

items.desc_en: Ofcom has fined a slew of sites it says are failing to prevent children accessing their adult content.
items.desc_zh: Ofcom 对大量网站进行了罚款，称其未能阻止儿童访问其成人内容。

items.title_en: Outcry as Meta lets users make AI images from public Instagram profile pics
items.title_zh: Meta 允许用户从公开的 Instagram 个人资料照片制作人工智能图像，引起强烈抗议
items.desc_en: The tech giant said people can opt out - but privacy campaigners called it a "recipe for disaster".
items.desc_zh: 这家科技巨头表示，人们可以选择退出，但隐私活动人士称这是“灾难的秘诀”。
